summary: Completed testing of AI Chart Features (chart recommendations, preset/custom themes, tier-based restrictions). All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - AI auto-triggers on dataset selection, shows loading state, displays suggestion cards with confidence percentages, and clicking applies chart configuration. Pricing page displays all 4 AI feature cards correctly with tier availability labels.

backend: GET /api/user/tier-info - returns limits object (ai_summary_limit, ai_chart_suggest_limit, custom_themes_limit, has_ai_features)
GET /api/user/tier-info - Pro tier has AI features enabled (has_ai_features=true)
GET /api/themes/presets - themes have required fields (id, name, colors)
GET /api/themes/presets - includes expected theme IDs (violet, ocean, sunset, forest, rose, midnight, corporate, warm, cool, neon)
GET /api/themes/custom - returns themes array with count
GET /api/themes/custom - returns limit info (limit, count, can_create_more)
POST /api/ai/suggest-charts - Pro user receives AI suggestions (not tier_restricted)
POST /api/ai/suggest-charts - suggestions have required fields (type, title, x_field, confidence)
Tier limits configuration verified (free tier has_ai_features=false)
frontend: Chart Studio opens correctly when clicking 'Create Chart'
Dataset selection dropdown works
AI suggestions auto-trigger when dataset is selected
Toast notification 'Found X chart recommendations!' appears
AI Recommendations section appears with badge showing count
Suggestion cards display with title and confidence percentage
Clicking AI suggestion applies chart name
Clicking AI suggestion selects appropriate chart type
Clicking AI suggestion populates X-axis field
Live Preview shows chart data after applying suggestion
Toast notification 'Applied AI suggestion' appears on click
Chart type buttons (bar, line, pie, area, scatter, radar, funnel, gauge, heatmap, treemap, waterfall, box plot) all visible
Color theme options (6 themes) visible
Style options (Show Legend, Show Labels) toggles work
Save Chart button visible and accessible
Pricing page displays 4 pricing tier cards (Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise)
AI-Powered Features section visible on Pricing page
AI Chart Recommendations card with 'Pro & Enterprise' label
AI Executive Summary card with 'Pro & Enterprise' label
AI Insights Assistant card with 'Pro & Enterprise' label
Smart Fallback System card with 'All Plans' label
Future-Proof AI Infrastructure note displayed
Compare All Features table shows AI & Analytics category
AI Chart Recommendations row shows Free=X, Starter=X, Pro=50/mo, Enterprise=Unlimited
Custom chart themes row visible in table

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chart Features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: /api/user/tier-info (GET), /api/themes/presets (GET - returns 10 themes), /api/themes/custom (GET - user's themes with limits), /api/ai/suggest-charts (POST - tier-based AI suggestions). Test user 'test@dataviz.com' is on Pro tier with AI features enabled. Dataset ID '2b7d310a-7980-4609-a015-76c7b4bb1e91' (Sales Data 2026) returns 5 AI chart suggestions with 90%+ confidence. Pricing page shows AI features in dedicated section and comparison table.
